general.summary: TODO IT: translate/adapt: The Five of Cups points to disappointment, regret, or emotional loss.
general.advice: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Acknowledge what hurt, but do not forget what still remains.

love.summary: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Old hurt, disappointment, or emotional distance may still be affecting the heart.
love.advice: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Healing begins when you stop living only inside what went wrong.

career.summary: TODO IT: translate/adapt: A setback or missed opportunity may still weigh on your confidence.
career.advice: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Learn from the loss, then look for what can still be rebuilt.

money.summary: TODO IT: translate/adapt: This card can suggest regret around past choices or missed financial chances.
money.advice: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Focus on the resources still available instead of only what was lost.

growth.summary: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Growth may begin by facing grief, disappointment, or self-blame with honesty.
growth.advice: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Do not let one difficult chapter become your entire story.

message.general: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Something may still feel disappointing, but the whole picture is not lost.
message.love: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Your heart may be protecting itself because something once hurt.
message.career: TODO IT: translate/adapt: A result may feel discouraging, but it can still become useful information.
message.money: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Regret can become a clearer plan when you look at what remains.
message.growth: TODO IT: translate/adapt: This is a moment to process pain without becoming defined by it.

situation.money: TODO IT: translate/adapt: An old financial worry may be taking too much emotional space.
situation.growth: TODO IT: translate/adapt: Self-compassion is needed before clarity can return.
